'''Iceberg Three''', or '''Iceberg III''', was a [[Comet/Legends|comet]] captured in the seventh [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of [[Daca/Legends|Daca]].

==History==
Prior to the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]], [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces invaded Iceberg Three, in an effort to gain a foothold in the system.<ref name="CWA: Iceberg Three">{{TCWA|Mission on Iceberg Three}}</ref> The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] controlled the comet and utilized it as a military outpost. The [[Iceberg Three Republic outpost|Republic outpost]] contained transports, tanks, and a listening post. Decades later, the comet was used as a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] staging ground prior to the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>
